title: Retry only idempotent calls with backoff and keys
description: Retry safe/idempotent requests with bounded exponential backoff and idempotency keys, never blindly replaying non-idempotent writes.
body: Use when adding retry behavior to a generated or hand-written client. Do not retry non-idempotent writes (e.g. a create without an idempotency key) on timeout, since the first call may have succeeded and a retry duplicates the effect. Actions: classify each operation, attach idempotency keys to mutating requests, retry only idempotent ones with capped exponential backoff plus jitter, and honor Retry-After. Validation signals include a test that injects a timeout-then-success and asserts exactly one server-side effect. Risk boundary: blind retries on payments or order creation cause double-charges; deny retry on unkeyed mutations and escalate the design instead.
